faqs.question: What is ERP? What Does ERP Even Mean?
faqs.answer: ERP is an acronym that stands for Enterprise Resource Planning, designed to help organizations manage operations and provide visibility into available resources.

faqs.question: Isn't ERP software just for finance and accounting?
faqs.answer: While companies often adopt ERP when accounting software falls short, ERP systems manage much more, including manufacturing, distribution, CRM, and inventory management.

faqs.question: When is the right time to update our ERP system?
faqs.answer: Key signs include doubled decision time, increased working capital tied up in inventory, redundant software programs, suffering customer experience, and growth needs exceeding current system capacity.

faqs.question: What is the best ERP software for our business?
faqs.answer: The answer of course is – it depends, on manufacturing type, business size, industry compliance, and IT considerations like ease of use and total cost of ownership.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of cloud-based ERP?
faqs.answer: Cloud ERP reduces in-house support needs, saves hardware costs, scales easily, and improves information sharing across regions.

faqs.question: How is ERP different from MRP?
faqs.answer: MRP tracked parts and components; ERP expanded this to integrate financial, sales, and production operations into end-to-end business management.

faqs.question: How do we measure the ROI of implementing ERP software?
faqs.answer: Companies measure ROI through cost/time savings, reduced risks, improved governance, and automation benefits across various departments.

faqs.question: We don't know. Can you help us define our ERP requirements?
faqs.answer: We offer preliminary assessments and modeled blueprints evaluating strategic objectives, current processes, IT maturity, and information needs.

faqs.question: What is Two-Tier ERP?
faqs.answer: Businesses maintain multiple ERP solutions—a large-scale enterprise system plus a second solution for specific divisions, sharing data via EDI and cloud technologies.

faqs.question: Can you help with my ERP Implementation Software?
faqs.answer: Contact info@dataerpsys.com or (+91) 9848045513 for assistance with ERP implementation according to organizational requirements.

faqs.question: What Is ERP Implementation Methodology?
faqs.answer: Five rollout methodologies exist: phased, parallel, pilot, combination, and SaaS-based approaches, varying by company size and industry.

faqs.question: How does SAP HANA compare to Oracle or IBM?
faqs.answer: SAP HANA functions as a database replacement offering superior performance through in-memory processing capabilities versus caching solutions.

faqs.question: Does SAP HANA require indexes or aggregates?
faqs.answer: Every column in SAP HANA is stored as an index, eliminating separate primary indexes; aggregation is unnecessary given HANA's processing speed.

faqs.question: Is SAP HANA a row- or column-oriented database?
faqs.answer: SAP HANA stores data for processing primarily in columnar format, designed efficiently for all database operations, with 99% of ERP tables using columnar storage.

faqs.question: What Operating Systems does SAP HANA run on?
faqs.answer: Supported on Intel x86 with SUSE Linux and RedHat Linux; IBM POWER supports SUSE Linux only.

faqs.question: What language was SAP HANA written in?
faqs.answer: The majority of the SAP HANA software stack was written in C++, with select optimizations in C, machine code, Python, HTML, and JavaScript.
